name: engineering-board
description: Autonomous engineering board management with passive listening. Converts docs/boards/ markdown into event-driven behavior: per-turn finding-extractor populates per-session scratch boards; live-board promotion happens via deterministic consolidation at session end. Routes findings in real-time, validates entries on write, warns on in_progress at session start, enforces routing before session end. v0.2.1 adds Scratch Capture (extractor + scratch boards + /board-pause + /board-resume).
